title: Internal Error: multiple write refs on LHS of NBA

features.name: enum type function parameter with NBA context
features.description: Code should include an enum type used as a function parameter, where the parameter is declared as input and the function is called in a non-blocking assignment context

features.name: enum localparam with width-truncated expression
features.description: Code should include an enum localparam initialized with a subtraction expression that causes width truncation warning
features.snippet:
typedef enum logic [1:0] {A=0, B=1, C=2, D=3} fifo_ptr_t;
localparam fifo_ptr_t MAX_PTR_VAL = 4 - 1;
